FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Migration Wave
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers across the empire are migrating from rural settlements toward the cities, drawn by promises of better conditions and opportunity.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: A wave of migration is sweeping across your settlements. Rural workers are leaving for the cities in droves. The countryside thins while urban centers swell. How do you respond?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Encourage urbanization. The future belongs to cities.
Incentivize rural living with subsidies and land grants.
Let people move freely. The empire will adapt.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Urbanization Encouraged
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Official policy now favors city growth. Urban settlements boom with new arrivals, but the countryside struggles to maintain its output with fewer hands.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Rural Incentives
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Land grants and subsidies have stemmed the tide of migration. Rural workers feel valued, and some city dwellers have even made the move to the countryside.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Free Movement
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: People move as they please. Some settlements grow, others shrink. The empire adapts, though the transition isn't entirely smooth.
